summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification for 10 job candidates. No GitHub mutations are planned. Closed candidates are kept closed, the security-sensitive provider PR is routed to central security handling, and open useful PRs with unresolved merge/review/product state are kept or escalated narrowly.
